titleFormatted.en: [Countdown] Set [[identifier]] for [[days]]d [[hours]]h [[minutes]]m [[seconds]]s with label [[name]] and message [[message]]
titleFormatted.nl: [Aftellen] Stel [[identifier]] in voor [[days]]d [[hours]]u [[minutes]]m [[seconds]]s met label [[name]] en bericht [[message]]

hint.en: Set a countdown by duration from now. Days, hours, minutes and seconds all accept flow tokens.
hint.nl: Stel een afteller in op basis van een duur vanaf nu. Dagen, uren, minuten en seconden accepteren flow-tokens.
